title: MRX §9 Per-Page Sign-Off Rubric
description: Generated from project-pack/04-compliance/MRX Compliance Review.md §9. The frontend zod schema mirrors this. Every page in src/content/pages/ must populate every field.
checklist: No occurrence of any phrase in §4 disallowed list
No 'only / most / best / guaranteed' superlative about MRX
No 'we recommend / we advise' advice verb
No named underwriter on landing pages (§8)
§7 disclaimer present in footer (or top of page for tax/legal/methodology pages)
Any customer testimonial has a real first name + last initial + state + date, and was collected with consent, no incentive, and no sentiment gating
Any money figure (price, multiple, savings, tax rate) is sourced or softened
CTAs ('Book', 'Get my free review') lead to a page that is genuinely free and has no card-required step
Form fields exclude sensitive-data collection (SSN, DOB, full bank info)
Meta description and OG copy do not contain disallowed phrases
Alt text on images does not make unsupported claims
Page is accessible (alt text, contrast, focus order) per stage 10/11
